input.initialPrompt:
I'm migrating from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI. My existing code uses
ListView with ViewCell for each item. Should I keep using ListView in
MAUI? Also, can I reuse my ViewCell templates inside CollectionView?

data.content:
**ListView → CollectionView** is the recommended path in MAUI. `ListView` still exists for compatibility, but `CollectionView` is preferred because it:

- Uses platform-native virtualization (no `ViewCell` wrapper needed)
- Supports flexible layouts (grid, horizontal, etc.)
- Has better performance

**Can you reuse ViewCell templates in CollectionView?**

No. `CollectionView` uses `DataTemplate` directly — it doesn't support `ViewCell`. You'll need to unwrap your `ViewCell` content into a plain `DataTemplate`:

```xml
<!-- Before (ListView) -->
<ListView>
  <ListView.ItemTemplate>
    <DataTemplate>
      <ViewCell>
        <StackLayout>
          <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
        </StackLayout>
      </ViewCell>
    </DataTemplate>
  </ListView.ItemTemplate>
</ListView>

<!-- After (CollectionView) -->
<CollectionView>
  <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    <DataTemplate>
      <StackLayout>
        <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
      </StackLayout>
    </DataTemplate>
  </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
</CollectionView>
```

**TL;DR:** Drop `ViewCell`, keep the inner layout, switch to `CollectionView`.
